description: Secure a multi-tier application by implementing network isolation using Docker. Create two custom bridge networks named 'frontend' and 'backend'. Deploy three containers with specific network assignments: 'web-proxy' (image: nginx:alpine) connected only to the 'frontend' network with host port 8081 mapped to container port 80; 'app-server' (image: httpd:alpine) connected to both 'frontend' and 'backend' networks; and 'data-store' (image: redis:alpine) connected only to the 'backend' network with host port 6380 mapped to container port 6379. The goal is to ensure 'web-proxy' cannot directly communicate with 'data-store' while 'app-server' can communicate with both.
